spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Rounded, safe, friendly, and tactile.
spacing_and_layout.landing_page: Asymmetric 'Tetris' bento grids. Large paddings (py-24, gap-12). Focus on storytelling.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard: Control room bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4), tight gaps (gap-6). Every pixel utilized, no jagged bottoms.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: p-6 to p-8 inside cards to prevent text collision. Never cram content.

surfaces.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm sticky top-0 z-50

components.inputs: rounded-2xl border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#A7E8D0] focus:border-transparent
components.charts: Use Chart.js. Style dataset colors with: ['#FF8C73', '#A7E8D0', '#FDF3B8', '#E6DDFA', '#C4E6FA']. Use 0 tension for precise data, or high tension for smooth playful curves. Remove grid lines if possible for cleaner look.
components.logo: Build a typography-based logo paired with a Lucide-react icon (e.g., Sun, Smile, or Baby). Make the icon color #FF8C73.

hero_background.usage: Landing page hero section background layer, behind the main content.

kids_playing_1.usage: Landing page featured image (Hero foreground or About Us section).

kids_playing_2.usage: Program overview, Curriculum section, or Enrollment CTA image.

teacher_1.usage: Staff highlight on landing page or teacher profile avatar in the dashboard.

teacher_2.usage: Parent testimonials or classroom feature section.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a full-stack Kindergarten app. Use pure HTML/Tailwind for Landing Page. Use custom Shadcn UI (with rounded corners) for the multi-role Dashboard (Admin, Teacher, Parent). All React components must be in .js files.
instructions_to_main_agent.styling: Enforce soft corners (`rounded-2xl` or `rounded-[2rem]`). Maintain high contrast for accessibility. Ensure all hover/focus states are defined. Apply `data-testid` to all interactive components.
instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Integrate 'Fredoka' (headings) and 'Nunito' (body) via Google Fonts in index.html, map them in tailwind.config.js.
instructions_to_main_agent.routing_and_auth: Set up React Router. Enrollment workflow should have a public form. The Dashboard routes should check for the user's role (Admin, Teacher, Parent).
instructions_to_main_agent.backend: Integrate FastAPI endpoints. If specific endpoints are pending, create mocked fetch calls in a dedicated `api.js` file, highlighting them as MOCKED.
